description_long: This is an ornate, dark wood side cabinet or shelf with a classic, vintage design. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or small objects. The front features a single central drawer with a brass handle, framed by carved wooden details, and below the drawer are two open shelves for additional storage. The sides of the cabinet are elegantly curved, giving the piece a sophisticated and traditional appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the finish is smooth and glossy, enhancing the rich reddish-brown color. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or glass panels.
description: A vintage-style, dark wood cabinet with a brass-handled drawer and two open shelves, featuring ornate curved sides and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brass-handled drawer, two open shelves, and ornate curved sides.
description_view_1: Rear view with a solid wood back, no drawer or handle visible, and the same curved side profile.
description_view_2: Side view showing the solid wood panel and the elegant curvature of the cabinet's profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curvature and solid wood panel of the other side.
